content.text:
All 14 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added high-enchantment surcharge logic in `nonComponentItemPremium`. When `enchantment >= 5`, adds 30% of the base premium as a surcharge, stacking additively with any curse surcharge.
- Result: All tests now pass (14 passing, 30 todo)
- Approach: Minimal change - added two named constants and a single conditional surcharge calculation following the same pattern as the existing curse surcharge. For sword ench 5: 100 base + 30 (30% high enchantment) = 130 item base; +13 insurance +5 fee = 148G. The `?? 0` defensively handles missing enchantment field, mirroring how the existing tests with no enchantment field still pass.

Relevant files:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_15-33-36_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
